variants.description: Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Updates vdac in the opposite direction for dcmp decisions.
Keeps the DAC search step fixed instead of dividing by radix each cycle.
Shrinks the search step twice as fast as the specified radix update.
Iterative ISAR DAC: preserves the iterative search state machine but drives the DAC output with inverted polarity.
